message:
chore: add gitignore patterns for ephemeral diff/patch files

Add diff.txt, *.diff, and *.patch to prevent accidental commits of
temporary comparison files generated during development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,6 +57,11 @@ artifacts/
 *.min
 *.seed
 
+# Ephemeral diff/patch files
+diff.txt
+*.diff
+*.patch
+
 # Local issue-tracking state
 .beads/
